name: io.github.MissionSquad/mcp-grok
title: MissionSquad Grok X.com Search
description: MissionSquad MCP server for searching X.com posts, users, threads, and trends with xAI's Grok API.

environmentVariables.name: XAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional local fallback xAI API key. MissionSquad deployments should use the hidden secret xaiApiKey instead.
